name: UsersAvatarGroup
description: A specialized avatar group component for displaying multiple users with tooltips, random colors for initials, and click handling.
usage_guidelines: Use for displaying lists of users (collaborators, participants, etc.).
Automatically generates colors for users without images.
Shows user names in tooltips on hover.
Supports click handling for user selection.

imgKey.description: Object key for user image URL.

onAvatarClick.description: Callback fired when avatar is clicked.

avatarProps.description: Props passed to each Avatar component.

styling_info.visual_description: Overlapping circular avatars with images or colored initials. Tooltips show names on hover. Chained layout with omitted avatar count.

Dont: Don't display too many users (use +N indicator)
Don't forget to handle missing images

Example.title: Example
